messages.content:
paraphrase: There is difficulty accessing and using the AlManhal platform, our IT team has identified that this service outage is due to an unexpected surge in user traffic.

Our team is actively working to resolve this issue as quickly as possible and will update you accordingly.

So we cannot have a live demo on AlManhal today and I apologize for the short notice and inconvenience.

Can we shift the training date to be in next Wednesday at the same time?

We are currently experiencing problems with the accessibility and functionality of the AlManhal platform. Our IT team has determined that the issue is a result of an unanticipated increase in user traffic.

Our team is actively working to rectify the problem as promptly as we can, and we will keep you updated on any progress.

As a result, we will be unable to provide a live demonstration on AlManhal today. I apologize for the late notice and any inconvenience caused.

Would it be possible to reschedule the training session for next Wednesday at the same time?
make it as an email

Subject: Technical Difficulties with AlManhal Platform and Request for Training Date Change

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inform you about an ongoing issue that we are experiencing with the AlManhal platform.

Unfortunately, we are currently encountering difficulties in accessing and using the platform. After thorough investigation, our IT team has determined that this service disruption is a result of an unexpected surge in user traffic. Rest assured, our team is actively working on resolving this issue as quickly as possible, and we will keep you updated on any progress made.

Due to these unforeseen circumstances, I regret to inform you that we will be unable to provide the live demo on AlManhal as planned today. I sincerely apologize for the short notice and any inconvenience this may cause.

In light of this situation, I kindly request your flexibility in rescheduling the training session. Would it be possible to shift the training date to next Wednesday, at the same time? This change will allow us to ensure a smooth experience using the AlManhal platform during the training, once the technical issues are resolved.

I understand that rescheduling might cause some inconvenience on your end, but we highly appreciate your understanding and cooperation in accommodating this change. We are committed to providing you with the best possible training experience and believe that scheduling the training on a day when the platform is fully functional will greatly enhance its effectiveness for all participants.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience if next Wednesday works for you, or if we need to explore alternative dates. We will do our best to accommodate any preferred dates within a reasonable timeframe.

Once again, I apologize for any inconvenience caused by this situation and appreciate your patience and cooperation. If you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to me directly.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position/Department]
[Your Company/Organization]
I need a response for this : Attached signed LOA by our CEO for your action please.

Dear [Sender's Name],

Thank you for sending the signed LOA (Letter of Authorization) by our CEO. I have received it and appreciate your prompt action.

I will immediately proceed with the necessary actions outlined in the LOA. Should any further information or clarification be required, I will reach out to you promptly.

Thank you once again for your cooperation and support.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position/Department]
[Your Company/Organization]
paraphrase: Once sending the PO will release the invoice
The invoice will be released once the purchase order (PO) has been sent.
how to ask the customer to send the PO to relese the invoice for them

Dear [Customer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to kindly remind you about the pending invoice for [product/service]. In order to proceed with the release of the invoice, we kindly request that you please provide us with the purchase order (PO) related to this transaction.

The PO is essential for our internal processes and allows us to accurately match your payment with the corresponding invoice. Once we receive the PO, we will promptly release the invoice for your reference and initiate further necessary actions.

If you have any questions or require assistance in generating the PO, please don't hesitate to reach out to me or our team. We greatly appreciate your cooperation in providing the required documentation to move forward with the invoice process.

Thank you for your attention to this matter, and we look forward to receiving the purchase order at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position/Department]
[Your Company/Organization]

paraphrase: Dear Ms. Rola,

Kindly find the attached signed LOA.

Once we receive the PO, we will promptly release the invoice for you.

All the best,
AbdelGhafoor

Dear Ms. Rola,

I hope this email finds you well. I am pleased to inform you that the signed Letter of Authorization (LOA) is attached to this message.

We kindly request that you please provide us with the purchase order (PO) as soon as possible, so that we can proceed with the necessary invoice release for you promptly.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,
AbdelGhafoor
paraphrase: Sohar University following up with me regarding the revised quotation, we need your approval to make the increase 7% instead 10%
Sohar University has contacted me to follow up on the revised quotation. They are requesting your approval for a decrease in the increase from 10% to 7%.
re
Sohar University has reached out to me regarding the revised quotation. They are kindly seeking your approval to adjust the increase from 10% to a lower percentage of 7%.
paraphrase: Sohar University following up with me regarding the revised quotation, I need your approval to make the increase 7% instead 10%
Sohar University has contacted me to provide an update on the revised quotation. They are requesting your approval to adjust the increase from 10% to a reduced percentage of 7%.

paraphrase: Thank you for your email,

Kindly find attached revised quotation with discount on Option 1, to confirm please sign the quotation or provide us with the PO and return back a copy to us via email 

All the best,
AbdelGhafoor

Thank you for reaching out to us via email.

Please find attached the revised quotation, which includes a discount on Option 1. To confirm your acceptance, kindly sign the quotation or provide us with the purchase order (PO) and return a copy to us via email.

Best regards,
AbdelGhafoor
paraphrase: do you need 2 split invoices for the 2 payment installments? or 1 invoice with 2 split payment
Do you require two separate invoices for the two payment installments, or would you prefer to have a single invoice with split payments indicated?
paraphrase: A quick question please, Do you require two separate invoices for the two payment instalments, or would you prefer to have a single invoice with split payments indicated?
I have a quick question for you. Would you like us to issue two separate invoices for the two payment installments, or would you prefer a single invoice with the split payments clearly indicated?

اعادة صياغة: عميلنا العزيز،

نحن ندرك أن أنظمتنا غير متاحة مؤقتًا. يعمل فريق تكنولوجيا المعلومات لدينا بنشاط مع شركائنا في التكنولوجيا لاستئناف الخدمات بأعلى مستوى من الاستقرار والأداء.

قد تستمر في مواجهة انقطاع الخدمة خلال الأيام القادمة بينما نقوم بإعداد بنيتنا التحتية الجديدة.

نعتذر عن أي إزعاج قد يسببه هذا الأمر ونقدر تفهمك.

بإخلاص،

فريق كيزانا

عميلنا الكريم،

ندرك تمامًا أن النظام لدينا غير متاح في الوقت الحالي. نحن نعمل بجد مع فريق تكنولوجيا المعلومات لضمان استعادة الخدمة بأعلى مستوى من الاستقرار والأداء، ونعمل أيضًا مع شركائنا في مجال التكنولوجيا لهذا الغرض.

قد يظل انقطاع الخدمة قائمًا في الأيام المقبلة أثناء العمل على بنية تحتية جديدة.


نشعر بالأسف الشديد لأي إزعاج قد يسببه هذا الانقطاع، ونقدر تفهمك وصبرك.

مع خالص التحية،

فريق كيزانا

عميلنا الكريم،

ندرك تمامًا أن النظام لدينا غير متاح في الوقت الحالي. نحن نعمل بجد مع فريق الدعم الفني لضمان استعادة الخدمة بأعلى مستوى من الاستقرار والأداء، ونعمل أيضًا مع شركائنا في مجال التكنولوجيا لهذا الغرض.

قد يستمر انقطاع الخدمة قائمًا في الأيام المقبلة بينما نقوم بإعداد بنيتنا التحتية الجديدة.

نعتذر عن أي ازعاج قد يسببه هذا الانقطاع، ونقدر تفهمك وصبرك.

فريق كيزانا

عميلنا الكريم،

نتفهم تمامًا تأثرك بعدم توفر النظام لدينا حاليًا. نحن نقوم ببذل قصارى جهدنا مع فريق الدعم الفني لضمان استعادة الخدمة بأعلى مستوى من الاستقرار والأداء. نعمل مع شركائنا في مجال التكنولوجيا أيضًا بهدف تحقيق ذلك.

قد يستمر انقطاع الخدمة خلال الأيام المقبلة بينما نعمل على إعداد بنية تحتية جديدة ومحسنة.

نعتذر عن أي إزعاج قد يسببه هذا الانقطاع، ونقدر تفهمك وصبرك خلال هذه الفترة.

تقديرنا العميق،
فريق كيزانا
